name: claude-toolkit-sandbox
_comment_security: Host Docker socket is INTENTIONALLY NOT mounted — agent escape via the daemon would defeat the sandbox. Network egress is allowed (npm, pip, gh) but the agent has no host-filesystem access beyond the cloned project. To run with bypass mode (--dangerously-skip-permissions) safely, do it ONLY inside this container.
_comment_dotfiles: We deliberately do NOT mount your host ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, or ~/.config. If you need a tool inside the container that requires credentials, set them via containerEnv from a Codespaces secret or a docker-compose .env file. Never bake secrets into the image.
